title: Expedition 72
description: Expedition 72 began on Sept. 23, 2024 and ended April 18, 2025. The orbital residents explored a variety of space phenomena to benefit humans on and off the Earth including pharmaceutical manufacturing, advanced life support systems, genetic sequencing in microgravity, and more.
text:
Learn more about the range of advanced space research, technology demonstrations, and more the Expedition 72 crew is conducting.
The SpaceX Crew-9 members will investigate blood cell development in space, X-rays emitted by neutron stars, taking a vitamin supplement to improve vision, space agriculture, and more.
The SpaceX Crew-10 members are studying how microgravity affects production of protein by microalgae, testing a microscope to capture microbial activity, and studying genetic activity in biofilms.
The Expedition 72 crew is taking images of the Earth, the orbiting station, their daily lives aboard, and the experiments they conduct during their stay, plus so much more. Check out some of the images in the Expedition 72 gallery.
